subcodes.first_line: O illumined leaves! What ye have written was noted, and the cry and lamentation from the intensity of longing [was heard] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقات نوراء آنچه مرقوم داشتید ملحوظ گردید و فریاد و فغان از شدت اشتیاق
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Shrines and Holy places, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
